r(c)end,function()F=(381935+-381934)+F n[F]=815081-815080 return F end,function(o)for y=363020+-363019,#o,-634097+634098 do n[o[y]]=(-962035+962036)+n[o[y]]end if R then local t=R(true)local r=h(t)r[y(86618+-69565)],r[y(-483878-(-500724))],r[y(-331508-(-348262))]=o,L,function()return 4180695-60850 end return t else return j({},{[y(970739+-953893)]=L;[y(469727-452674)]=o,[y(126617+-109863)]=function()return 3325303-(-794542)end})end end,function(o,y)local r=N(y)local R=function(R,j,h,Q,c,a,n)return t(o,{R;j;h,Q;c;a,n},y,r)end return R end,function(o,y)local r=N(y)local R=function(R)return t(o,{R},y,r)end return R end return(w(781873+8362291,{}))(r(c))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(908363-891843)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
